query: Find issues older than 90 days where the suggested fix is already present in the code but no PR explicitly references the issue.
expected_behavior: Applies Signal 2c (stale-context bypass: +0.2 confidence bonus when Signal 2b fires for issues older than 90 days but Signal 3 does not).
Greps current main for the expected fix patterns from the issue body, confirming the fix is present.
Combines Signal 2b + 2c to clear the 0.6 threshold even without an explicit PR cross-reference, since old issues often have fixes shipped as part of refactors that did not cite the issue number.
Records calibration data in /tmp/find-already-fixed-calibration.jsonl so maintainers can tune Signal 2c thresholds based on real outcomes over time.
